---
id: handle-export-links
title: "Export links as CSV"
description: "Exports all active links for the authenticated organization as a CSV file. Returns a text/csv response with a Content-Disposition attachment header"
sidebar_label: "Export links as CSV"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Export links as CSV"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/links/export"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Exports all active links for the authenticated organization as a CSV file. Returns a text/csv response with a Content-Disposition attachment header
